description_long: This is a classic roadside mailbox mounted on a tall, square post with a decorative pointed cap at the top. The mailbox itself is rectangular and black, featuring a red flag on its side for mail notification. The post appears to be made of painted wood or metal, anchored into a stone or concrete base for stability. The mailbox has a front-hinged door for mail retrieval and a mail slot at the front center. The overall design is utilitarian yet decorative, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods. There are no visible identification markings or numbers on the mailbox.
description: A black rectangular mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a tall, square post with a pointed cap and stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mailbox's door and the pointed cap of the post.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red mail flag and the length of the mailbox.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the mailbox and the full height of the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the mailbox's side panel and no visible flag.
